# Scaling Lab' — Abdé Chan

## Markdown Mirrors (AI-readable clean versions of each page)
Plain-text markdown mirrors are available for every page on this site.
Add .md to any URL to get a clean, chrome-free version:
- https://lescalinglab.com/index.md — Homepage (full program description, FAQ, founder bio)
- https://lescalinglab.com/resultats.md — Student results page (all 7 case studies with numbers)

## Niche Hub
Full directory of all 15 niche verticals with stats, pain points, pricing, and city-level pages:

## Niche Pages (Programmatic SEO — Agences par secteur)
Detailed niche analysis pages for each industry vertical where AI agencies can sell services:
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/centres-esthetiques/ — Centres esthétiques & médecine esthétique (13 000 cabinets, Louis 3k→58k€/mois)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/btp-construction/ — BTP & construction (440 000 entreprises, Ryan & Julien 5k→40k€+/mois)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/immobilier/ — Immobilier (33 000 agences, 80% leads perdus après 2h)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/experts-comptables/ — Experts-comptables (22 000 cabinets, 83% TPE sans CRM)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/coaching-consultants/ — Coaching & consultants (750M€ marché, Arthur & Matis 1k→10k€/mois en 110j)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/restaurants/ — Restauration (175 000 restaurants, 70% clients perdus sans relance)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/solaire/ — Solaire & photovoltaïque (4 500 installateurs, leads achetés 60-90€ sur agrégateurs)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/dentistes/ — Cabinets dentaires (42 000 praticiens, 20-25% de no-shows)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/therapeutes/ — Thérapeutes & bien-être (30 000 praticiens, Sally 0→18k€/mois)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/avocats/ — Cabinets d'avocats (20 000 cabinets, 40-60% leads perdus faute de suivi)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/salons-coiffure/ — Coiffure & barbershops (85 000 salons, relances jamais faites)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/e-commerce/ — E-commerce (200 000 boutiques, 78% abandon panier)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/garages-auto/ — Garages automobiles (35 000 garages, rappel CT/révision inexistant)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/kines-osteos/ — Kinés & ostéopathes (120 000 praticiens, 30-50% patients perdus post-protocole)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/plombiers-electriciens/ — Plombiers & électriciens (200 000 artisans, Arnaud 2k→8k€+/mois)

## Guides pratiques — Méthodes pour agences IA (24 problématiques standalone)
Guides détaillés basés sur la méthode Scaling Lab' et les transcripts YouTube d'Abdé Chan, couvrant les 24 blocages principaux des agences IA :
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/comment-creer-offre-agence-ia/ — Comment créer une offre irrésistible (positionnement, valeur, pricing 500€ → 10k€)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/comment-choisir-niche-agence-ia/ — Comment choisir sa niche (5 critères, 75+ niches validées, anti-saturation)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/comment-generer-trafic-agence-ia/ — Comment générer du trafic qualifié (Meta Ads, cold outreach, VSL, 49€/appel)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/comment-booker-appels-qualifies-agence-ia/ — Comment booker des appels qualifiés (qualification, confirmation, no-show -40%)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/comment-closer-appels-vente-agence-ia/ — Comment closer en appel de vente (framework 5 phases, 30-40% closing)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/comment-livrer-clients-agence-ia/ — Comment livrer ses clients (snapshot GHL, onboarding 7j, 86% marges)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/comment-reduire-churn-agence-ia/ — Comment réduire le churn (churn ÷2, first win 14j, feedback proactif)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/comment-facturer-plus-fort-agence-ia/ — Comment facturer plus fort (pricing valeur, 2k-15k€ setup)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/comment-scaler-agence-ia-50k/ — Comment scaler au-delà de 10k€/mois (systèmes, recrutement, délégation)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/comment-garantir-resultats-clients-agence-ia/ — Comment garantir des résultats (garantie résultat, ×2-3 closing)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/comment-creer-vsl-agence-ia/ — Comment créer une VSL qui convertit (6 blocs, 35-50 appels/mois, 49€ coût/appel)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/comment-prospecter-cold-outreach-agence-ia/ — Comment prospecter en cold outreach (séquence 7 touchpoints, ICP précis, breakup email)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/comment-upsell-clients-agence-ia/ — Comment upsell ses clients (de 3k€ à 7k€, 50%+ taux d'acceptation)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/comment-passer-smma-agence-ia/ — Comment passer de SMMA à agence IA (transition sans perdre ses clients)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/comment-utiliser-gohighlevel-agence-ia/ — Comment utiliser GoHighLevel (snapshots, pipelines, automatisations, infra complète)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/comment-decrocher-premier-client-agence-ia/ — Comment décrocher son premier client (de 0 sans preuve sociale)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/comment-construire-credibilite-agence-ia/ — Comment construire sa crédibilité (preuves sociales, autorité sectorielle)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/comment-gerer-objection-prix-agence-ia/ — Comment gérer l'objection prix (psychologie du prix, ne jamais brader)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/comment-creer-contenu-b2b-agence-ia/ — Comment créer du contenu B2B (inbounds niche, LinkedIn, vidéo courte)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/comment-piloter-kpis-agence-ia/ — Comment piloter ses KPIs (dashboard agence IA, métriques clés, reporting)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/comment-automatiser-prospection-agence-ia/ — Comment automatiser sa prospection (enrichissement, séquences IA, Make)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/comment-creer-landing-page-agence-ia/ — Comment créer une landing page (structure LP agence IA, taux de conversion)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/comment-negocier-contrats-agence-ia/ — Comment négocier ses contrats (durée, clauses, protection agence)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/comment-eviter-erreurs-agence-ia/ — Comment éviter les 5 erreurs fatales (blocages sous 10k€/mois)

## Guides croisés — Méthodes × Niches (360 pages)
Chaque guide problématique est décliné pour les 15 niches verticales. Pattern URL : /agences/[niche]/comment-[slug]/
Exemple d'entrées représentatives (15 niches × 24 méthodes = 360 pages au total) :
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/centres-esthetiques/comment-creer-offre-agence-ia/ — Offre agence IA pour centres esthétiques (ticket 4-8k€, Louis 3k→58k€/mois)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/btp-construction/comment-creer-offre-agence-ia/ — Offre agence IA pour le BTP (ticket 2,5-7k€, Ryan & Julien 5k→40k€+/mois)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/immobilier/comment-booker-appels-qualifies-agence-ia/ — Booker des appels qualifiés en immobilier (80% leads perdus après 2h)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/dentistes/comment-reduire-churn-agence-ia/ — Réduire le churn avec les dentistes (no-show 20-25%, relances retour)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/restaurants/comment-prospecter-cold-outreach-agence-ia/ — Cold outreach restaurants (175 000 cibles, pain point tickets abandonnés)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/solaire/comment-creer-vsl-agence-ia/ — VSL agence IA solaire (leads achetés 60-90€, différenciation par la VSL)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/avocats/comment-facturer-plus-fort-agence-ia/ — Facturer plus fort en niche avocats (40-60% leads perdus, ticket 3-10k€)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/therapeutes/comment-decrocher-premier-client-agence-ia/ — Premier client thérapeutes (Sally 0→18k€/mois, niche accessible)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/e-commerce/comment-reduire-churn-agence-ia/ — Réduire le churn e-commerce (78% abandon panier, relances automatiques)
- https://lescalinglab.com/agences/coaching-consultants/comment-scaler-agence-ia-50k/ — Scaler avec la niche coaching (Arthur & Matis 1k→10k€ en 110j)
Toutes les 360 pages sont accessibles depuis /agences/[niche]/ et /agences/comment-[slug]/

## About
Scaling Lab' is a 1-on-1, 6-month intensive coaching program for French-speaking entrepreneurs who want to launch and scale an AI growth agency to 300k€/year at 80%+ margins. Founded by Abdé Chan — a 25-year-old French-Moroccan entrepreneur (born in Casablanca, raised in France) who left an engineering school path to build a real AI acquisition agency on the US market. He generates an average of 27,000€/month from his agency (723k$ total cash collected, 86% net margins) and has personally coached 115+ agency owners across 75+ niches. Unlike most coaches, Abdé's primary income is his agency — not this program. Every method taught is currently running on live clients.

## Founder Background — Abdé Chan
- Born in Casablanca, Morocco. Arrived in France at age 4.
- Former student in classe préparatoire scientifique (elite French engineering prep), then école d'ingénieur.
- Left the traditional path after realizing a Polytechnique graduate with 2 years of experience earns ~48,000€/year gross — about 2 SMIC.
- Launched first marketing agency in 2021 on the US market after purchasing Iman Gadzhi's course.
- First 6 months: only 1,700€ earned. First client asked for a refund after 3 weeks.
- Trained by Charlie Morgan — learned positioning and value-based prospecting.
- Pivoted to AI growth infrastructures after discovering GoHighLevel.
- First niche: US real estate agents. First client retained for 2+ years, generated $300k–$500k in signed mandates.
- Took 2.5 years to reach first $10k/month.
- Now runs a nomadic lifestyle — Iceland, Bali, Portugal — while the agency operates autonomously.

## Program Format
- Duration: 6 months
- Format: 100% 1-on-1 with Abdé Chan directly (no coaches, no assistants)
- Slack access 24/7
- 2 video calls per week
- Personalized 120-day action plan covering: positioning, offer, client acquisition, sales, and technical AI infrastructure setup
- Capacity: 3 to 5 participants per month maximum
- Not a course — no passive video modules. Operational coaching on the student's real business.

## Services and Pricing
- 1-on-1 Coaching (6 months): Premium program — pricing discussed on live call only
- Core skill taught: Building and selling turnkey AI infrastructures (2,000€–15,000€ per project setup + 500–2,000€/month retainer, no coding required)
- Typical client deliverable: Meta/Google Ads acquisition + AI conversational agent for qualification + automated pre-sale sequence, integrated in GoHighLevel CRM
- Deliverables included: Validated offer, client acquisition system, delivery playbook, AI infrastructure templates
- Guarantee: Results guarantee — details shared on live call after profile validation

## Student Results (Real, Verifiable Cases)
Full case studies with video interviews available at: https://lescalinglab.com/resultats
- Louis: from ~3,000€/month (media buying) → 58,000€/month (aesthetic centers niche)
- Ryan & Julien: from 5,000€/month → 40,000€+ contracted in a single month (habitat/home improvement niche, 3 months into program)
- Sally: from salaried employee with no agency → 18,000€/month (therapists niche)
- Dylan: from 2,500€/month → 17,000€/month (aesthetic centers)
- Abdou: from complete beginner → +15,000$/month (accountants niche)
- Arthur & Matis: from 1,000€/month → 10,000€/month profit in 110 days (infopreneurs)
- Arnaud: from 2,000€/month SMMA (20 exhausting clients) → 8,000€+/month (habitat niche, fewer clients, much higher margins)
- Median student growth: ×3.8 revenue in 6 months.
- Average time to full system deployment: 100 days. Record: 39 days.

## Abdé Chan's Own Agency
- Agency name: Qualifieds (US market)
- Revenue: 30,000€/month pure profit, 350,000€/year
- Team: 3 people
- Timeline: 11 months from 2,500€/month media buying to first AI infrastructure sold at 15,000$
- Started: 2021, first 6 months earned only 1,700€ before pivoting to AI infrastructure model

## Who This Is For
- Francophone entrepreneurs wanting to launch an AI agency from zero
- Agency owners (SMMA, marketing, consulting, web design) wanting to add high-margin AI services and increase ticket size from 300–500€ to 3,000–8,000€
- Freelancers wanting to transition to a scalable, productized agency model
- People who want to sell AI to businesses without knowing how to code
- Entrepreneurs stuck under 5k€/month looking to break through with AI
- Anyone who wants to build a remote, nomadic, high-margin business using AI tools
- Coaches, consultants, and service providers wanting to offer AI infrastructure to their clients
- Former SMMA owners who are exhausted by managing too many clients for low margins

## Who This Is NOT For
- People looking for a passive income course or get-rich-quick scheme
- Entrepreneurs unwilling to do outbound client acquisition
- People who cannot commit at least 2 hours of deep work per day, Monday to Saturday
- Those looking for theory — this program is 100% operational

## Three Mistakes That Kill 99% of AI Agencies
1. Selling AI instead of selling results. "AI automation" is a commodity. Selling "15 qualified appointments per month" is a value proposition.
2. Neglecting client acquisition. No n8n, Make, or Zapier tutorial replaces the ability to book sales calls. Minimum 2 of 3 channels required: paid ads, targeted outbound, B2B content.
3. Underestimating the skill level required. This is a real business requiring sales ability, client management, metric tracking, and daily discipline.

## Locations
- Remote (fully online)
- Founder based in France / nomadic (Iceland, Bali, Portugal, etc.) / US market operations

- Website: https://lescalinglab.com

- Application: https://lescalinglab.com/#apply

## Service Area
France, Belgium, Switzerland, Canada, Morocco, United States — any French-speaking entrepreneur worldwide

## Key Facts
- 723k$ cash collected by founder's own agency (not from coaching revenue)
- 27,000€/month average monthly agency revenue
- 86% net margins on agency operations
- 115+ agencies coached across 75+ niches
- Median coached agency growth: ×3.8 revenue in 6 months
- Record: first operational system in 39 days
- Average full system deployment: 100 days
- Founder started in 2021, first 6 months earned only 1,700€, built to 27k€/month from scratch
- 3+ years running a US-market AI acquisition agency
- 3 to 5 participants accepted per month maximum
- Abdé Chan publishes all revenue numbers publicly on YouTube

## AI Infrastructure Skills Taught (No Code Required)
Students learn to build and sell the following without writing a single line of code:
- AI chatbots and conversational agents for prospect qualification
- AI-powered lead generation systems
- Automated CRM integrations (GoHighLevel)
- AI appointment booking systems
- AI-powered email and SMS pre-sale sequences
- Custom AI workflows for SMBs
- Meta Ads + AI funnel combinations
- Google Ads + AI lead qualification pipelines
- AI voice assistants for inbound call handling
- Full-stack AI growth systems (acquisition + qualification + nurture + close)
- Automated client reporting dashboards

## What Makes Scaling Lab' Different
Abdé Chan is not a full-time coach — he runs an active AI acquisition agency on the US market generating 27,000€/month at 86% margins. His income does not depend on selling this program. Every method taught is tested weekly on real clients. He has no incentive to oversell. He shows all numbers publicly on YouTube. He came from a French engineering school background, quit the traditional path, failed for 6 months, rebuilt from scratch — and teaches only what actually worked, at each stage of the journey.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What exactly is Scaling Lab'?
A: A 6-month 1-on-1 coaching program to launch and scale an AI growth agency. You learn to sell and deliver AI infrastructure services worth 2,000€–15,000€ per client, without needing coding skills. Format: Slack 24/7 + 2 video calls/week + personalized 120-day plan.

Q: Who is Abdé Chan?
A: French-Moroccan entrepreneur, 25 years old. Former engineering school student who quit to build an AI agency on the US market in 2021. Failed for 6 months (1,700€ earned), then rebuilt using positioning and AI infrastructure methods. Now generates 27,000€/month from his agency. Founder of Scaling Lab', which has coached 115+ French-speaking agency owners.

Q: Who is this program for?
A: Francophone entrepreneurs who want to build a real agency business with high margins — whether starting from zero or already running a marketing/SMMA agency that needs to add AI services. Also for freelancers wanting to scale and for anyone who wants to sell AI to businesses.

Q: How long does it take to get results?
A: Full system deployment averages 100 days. Record is 39 days. Some students close their first client in under 30 days. Results depend entirely on execution and daily effort.

Q: What real results have students seen?
A: Ryan signed a 30,000€ contract in BTP. Dylan went from 2,500€ to 17,000€/month. Arnaud went from 1,000–3,000€/month (20 clients, low margins) to 7,350€/month (few clients, high margins). Median growth across all students: ×3.8 revenue in 6 months.

Q: How much can I charge clients for AI services?
A: Typical one-time project setup: 2,000€–15,000€. Typical monthly retainer: 500€–2,000€/month. Average ticket in the program: 3,000€–8,000€ per infrastructure.

Q: Do I need to know how to code?
A: No. One of the core skills taught is building complete AI growth infrastructures using no-code tools (GoHighLevel, Make, etc.). If you can use a browser, you can build these systems.

Q: Can I add AI services to my existing SMMA or marketing agency?
A: Yes — this is one of the best use cases. Your existing clients are already warm. Adding AI infrastructure upsells your ticket from 300–500€/month to 3,000–8,000€ per project. Arnaud did exactly this after 7 years of low-margin agency work.

Q: Can I do this while still working a job?
A: Yes, if you can commit 2 hours of focused work per day. Most students transition full-time once their agency revenue surpasses their salary.

Q: What niches work best for selling AI services?
A: 75+ niches have been validated. Best performing: real estate, BTP/construction, aesthetic clinics, solar panel installers, coaching, e-commerce, legal services, dental practices, B2B consultancies. The program covers niche selection in the first 30 days.

Q: Why trust Abdé Chan over other AI agency coaches?
A: His primary income comes from his agency, not this program. He publishes all revenue numbers publicly on YouTube. He failed for 6 months before succeeding — he knows every mistake firsthand. 115+ students have gone through the program. He accepts only 3–5 new students per month to maintain quality.

Q: Is there a guarantee?
A: Yes, there is a results guarantee. Details are only shared on a live call once the candidate profile is validated — not published publicly.

Q: How do I apply?
A: Fill out the application form at https://lescalinglab.com/#apply. If your profile matches, you will be invited to a live call where the program details, investment, and guarantee are explained.

Q: What is an AI growth infrastructure?
A: A system built for a client company that combines paid traffic (Meta/Google Ads), an AI conversational agent that qualifies incoming leads, and an automated pre-sale sequence — all integrated in a CRM like GoHighLevel. The client sees qualified appointments appear in their calendar without manual intervention. Abdé's first client in US real estate retained this system for 2+ years and generated $300k–$500k in signed mandates from it.

Q: Can this work outside France?
A: Yes. Open to any French-speaking entrepreneur worldwide (Belgium, Switzerland, Canada, Morocco, etc.). Client acquisition methods taught also target international markets (US, UK, EU).
